name: Fajiabao Baby Bath Toys for Kids Ages 1-3 Toddler Bath Toys Mold Free for 2-4 Bathtub Sand Beach Pool Water Toys for 1+ Year Old Girl Gifts 5 PCS (Color Random)
bullets: 【FUN BATH TOYS】Baby bath toys include 1 watering can, 1 spoon, and 3 animal-shaped stackable cups that float, leak, and scoop water. Bath toys for 1 year old bright, cute designs attract babies, solving the challenge of getting them to bathe willingly. Small holes enable quick drainage and fun splashing, turning bath time into an interactive game that stimulates sensory development for ages 1-2. Babies learn cause and effect through water flow. These fun bath toys help with baby's growth.

【DURABLE & SAFE】Crafted from premium, BPA free materials, the bath toys toddlers 2-4 are odorless with smooth edges to protect baby's skin. Lightweight yet sturdy, they withstand rough play. Designed to fit little hands perfectly and won't slip easily even when wet for a secure grip. Mold free bath toys featuring a simple water-leaking design with no complex moving parts, they are easy to clean, dry quickly. Compact and convenient for storage and travel, they pack easily in suitcases.

【EARLY EDUCATION BATHTUB TOYS】These kids bath toys offer fun and educational diverse play. Guiding 1-2 year olds to grasp and pour water enhances hand-eye coordination and tactile skills. Stacking, knocking down, and nesting cups help 2-3 year olds develop size concepts and fine motor abilities. Encourage kids 3+ to create stories with the "fish", "crab", and "starfish", stimulating imagination and recognition of colors, shapes, and marine life.

【MULTI-FUNCTIONAL WATER TOYS】These bath toys for kids ages 3-5 are perfect for bathtubs, pools, and beach play. Babies can use the watering can to help with chores like watering plants on the balcony or rinsing vegetables in the kitchen, making them a cheerful little helper at home. Each stacking cup features uniquely shaped bases—such as hearts, stars, and triangles—for fun stamping games in the sand. This toy offers endless entertainment while promoting thinking skills and creativity.

【IDEAL GIFT FOR BABY】Ideal bath toys for babies 6-12 months this affordable set is perfect for Children's Day, birthdays, Christmas, baby shower gifts. A thoughtful gift for new parents - creates fun, tear-free bath times. For grandparents - soft and safe materials provide peace of mind. For friends' children - grows with kids through multi-functional play. A practical gift that helps development and brings lasting joy!

reviews.name: Sharon R.
reviews.title: My granddaughter loves it so it’s a perfect bath toy
reviews.body: My granddaughter loved this and right now at 20 months old she loves baby shark and there’s four pieces in there that look like little boats but they’re not their sharks and she literally plays with them when baby shark song comes on the entire set is just too cute. She can even use them down the shore colors are bright float in water so far no mold issues perfect bath toy.

reviews.name: Michelle Sweet
reviews.title: Adorable!
reviews.body: These were smaller than expected but, perfect for little hands! Colors were bright and cheerful. Durable and will last through many uses!

reviews.name: Michelle
reviews.title: Get what you order
reviews.body: Very cute and came as is in photos. The watering pot was a little smaller than I thought it would be but a perfect size for toddler. I imagine If it was bigger and filled with water then it would be harder for toddler to pick up.
